scriptLines: meta as (data_version as string, created as string, revision as integer),

info as (balls_per_over as integer, city as string, dates as string[], event as (name as string, match_number as integer), gender as string, match_type as string, officials as (match_referees as string[], reserve_umpires as string[], tv_umpires as string[], umpires as string[]), outcome as (winner as string, by as (wickets as integer, runs as integer)), overs as integer, player_of_match as string[], players as ({Kolkata Knight Riders} as string[], {Royal Challengers Bengaluru} as string[]), registry as (people as ({A Kripal Singh} as string, {A Raghuvanshi} as string, {AM Rahane} as string, {AS Roy} as string, {B Kumar} as string, {C Green} as string, {D Padikkal} as string, {FH Allen} as string, {JA Duffy} as string, {JG Bethell} as string, {JM Sharma} as string, {JR Hazlewood} as string, {KH Pandya} as string, {KM Gandhi} as string, {Kartik Tyagi} as string, {MK Pandey} as string, {Nitin Menon} as string, {R Pandit} as string, {R Powell} as string, {RK Singh} as string, {RM Patidar} as string, {Rasikh Salam} as string, {SP Narine} as string, {SR Dubey} as string, {TH David} as string, {TM Srivastava} as string, {V Kohli} as string, {VG Arora} as string, {VR Iyer} as string)), season as string, team_type as string, teams as string[], toss as (decision as string, winner as string), venue as string),

innings as (team as string, overs as (over as integer, deliveries as (batter as string, bowler as string, non_striker as string, runs as (batter as integer, extras as integer, total as integer), wickets as (player_out as string, filders as (name as string)[], kind as string)[])[])[], powerplays as (from as double, to as double, type as string)[])[]
